name: set_axis_align
description: Set primary and counter axis alignment for an auto-layout frame in Figma

nodeId.description: The ID of the frame to modify

primaryAxisAlignItems.description: Primary axis alignment (MIN/MAX = left/right in horizontal, top/bottom in vertical). Note: When set to SPACE_BETWEEN, itemSpacing will be ignored as children will be evenly spaced.

counterAxisAlignItems.description: Counter axis alignment (MIN/MAX = top/bottom in horizontal, left/right in vertical)
